name: zenify-my-terminal
description: Set up a fast, calm, focused terminal on macOS. Two modes — guided (walks through choices: terminal between WezTerm/Ghostty/Alacritty/Kitty/iTerm2/Apple Terminal, prompt between Starship/Oh My Posh with live theme preview script, plugins, optional extras) or fast-track (zero questions, applies the opinionated stack: WezTerm + Oh My Posh + zinit turbo + git/sudo/aws/kubectl snippets + project switcher over ~/projects + viddy + lazygit + status bar). When Claude Code is detected (`~/.claude/` exists), also installs a custom statusline showing model, context bar, rate limits, worktree, and effort level. Writes configs with macOS gotchas already handled. Ends with a keyboard-shortcuts cheat-sheet.
